metadata.description: CatPilot — a terminal-first personal knowledge OS for GitHub Copilot: tasks, journaling, milestones, memos, learning, growth, and project tracking, all file-based and Obsidian-friendly.

plugins.name: catpilot
plugins.description: CatPilot assistant for GitHub Copilot: capture tasks, journal notes, milestones, memos, learning/cert tracking, growth/review-prep notes, and project status — stored as plain markdown you can keep in an Obsidian vault.
